output.title: Landlord Won't Return Your Deposit? Here's Your 60-Second Fix
output.meta_description: Tired of your landlord withholding your security deposit? Learn your tenant rights and send a demand letter in 60 seconds for just $19.99.
content_outline: Why Landlords Illegally Withhold Security Deposits
What Your Landlord Can (and Cannot) Legally Deduct
Tenant Rights: State Deadlines for Returning Deposits
DIY vs. Deposits-Back: The Fastest Way to Demand Your Money
What to Do If Your Landlord Still Refuses to Pay
key_points: Most US states require landlords to return deposits within 14-30 days with an itemized statement.
Normal wear and tear cannot be deducted from a security deposit under landlord-tenant law.
A formal demand letter is often enough to force payment because it creates a legal paper trail.
Deposits-Back generates a state-specific demand letter in 60 seconds for $19.99 with no sign-up or subscription.
output.cta: Stop waiting. Get your deposit back in 60 seconds for $19.99—no sign-up, no subscription. Create your demand letter now at Deposits-Back.com.
output.target_audience: Frustrated US renters whose landlords are wrongfully withholding, delaying, or deducting from their security deposit and need a fast, affordable legal solution.
